entity.summary: Early Ethereum-based decentralized token exchange. HEI records EtherDelta as an inactive historical DEX with event-backed regulatory history, including the SEC's 2018 action involving its founder.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0843 after event-backed review. EtherDelta is treated as one historical DEX entity, not as a generic active database row. The entity status is inactive because the original venue is not treated as a current active exchange in this registry context. The present state of the original domain is not freshly verified, so official_url_status remains unknown.

events.title: EtherDelta operated as an early Ethereum token exchange
events.description: EtherDelta operated as an Ethereum-based token trading venue before the SEC's later regulatory action involving its founder.
events.notes: Launch/public-operation date is approximate and based on regulator and database context.

events.title: SEC action involving EtherDelta founder
events.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission announced a settled action involving EtherDelta's founder and the operation of EtherDelta as an online trading platform for ERC20 tokens.
events.notes: This is a founder/operator regulatory action and does not by itself provide a precise platform shutdown date.

events.title: EtherDelta consolidated from backlog candidate
events.description: EtherDelta is consolidated from the CoinPaprika candidate row into one historical DEX record.

evidence.title: SEC 2018 EtherDelta founder action press release
evidence.notes: SEC source describing EtherDelta's operation as an online platform for secondary market trading of ERC20 tokens.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for EtherDelta
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0843.

evidence.title: SEC charges EtherDelta founder with operating an unregistered exchange
evidence.notes: SEC press release for the settled action involving EtherDelta's founder.

evidence.title: SEC administrative order: Zachary Coburn / EtherDelta
evidence.notes: SEC order providing the primary legal-document basis for the regulatory event.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for EtherDelta
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0843.
